title: Pipeline Turn End Event
description: Payload sent to the pipeline verb's eventHook at the end of each conversational turn. Provides the user transcript, assistant response, and per-component latency metrics for the turn.

transcript.description: The user's final speech-to-text transcript for this turn. May be '(none)' if no transcript was captured (e.g. an interrupted turn before STT completed).

response.description: The assistant's full text response for this turn. May be empty or partial if the turn was interrupted.

interrupted.description: True if this turn was interrupted by the user barging in before the assistant finished speaking.

latency.description: Per-component latency metrics for this turn. All values are in milliseconds relative to the start of the turn (when the user began speaking). Fields are absent when not applicable.

total_ms.description: Total turn duration from start of user speech to LLM response completion.

final_transcript_ms.description: Time from turn start until the final transcript was received from the STT engine.

prompted_ms.description: Time from turn start until the LLM was prompted.

ttft_ms.description: Time-to-first-token: time from LLM prompt to first token received.

first_buffered_ms.description: Time from turn start until the first LLM token was buffered for TTS.

first_send_ms.description: Time from turn start until audio was first sent to the TTS engine.

buffer_delay_ms.description: Delay between first token buffered and first send to TTS engine.

preflight.description: Early generation (preflight) metrics. Only present when earlyGeneration is enabled.

ms.description: Time from turn start until the preflight prompt was sent.

result.description: Whether the preflight transcript matched the final transcript ('hit'), did not match ('miss'), or was still in progress ('pending').

tokens.description: Number of preflight tokens that were buffered. Only present on a 'hit'.
